notes: Overall the session felt pretty good. I do think that my shoulders and biceps were still a little tired from Saturday. We did get a little extra shoulder and bicep work in during the HIIT class but I was able to push through and get most of the reps here today.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench Press
exercises.planned: 62.5 lb ÃÂ 10 reps ÃÂ· 3 sets (use 65 lb if gym doesn't have 62.5s)

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Got 3 xs 10 here. Last rep tough. Shoulders still tired from hit class sat.

exercises.name: KB Single-Arm Row
exercises.planned: 45 lb KB ÃÂ 12 reps/side ÃÂ· 3 sets

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Got all these.  Last reps were tough

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Hammer Curl + Skull Crusher
exercises.planned: Hammer curl 25 lb ÃÂ 12 + Skull crusher 40 lb ÃÂ 10 ÃÂ· 3 rounds

exercises.name: Core Circuit C
exercises.planned: Cable crunch 50 lb ÃÂ 12 + Hanging knee raise ÃÂ 10-12 + Side plank 25s/side ÃÂ· 2 rounds
exercises.note: Got 12 reps on both sets of the hanging knee raise. I probably could have gotten another set in easily.

notes: Overall this was a good workout. I felt pretty strong throughout the whole thing. I definitely feel worked right now at the end but not too burnt. I was able to manage all the weights, all the reps clean, and I feel good.

exercises.name: Core Circuit D
exercises.planned: Plank shoulder tap x 10/side + Dead bugs x 8/side + Pallof press 40 lb x 10/side - 2 rounds

notes: Felt really strong today. Felt tight, like in a good way. My body and I looked strong in the mirror as well. Felt like I looked the strongest that I have ever looked in the mirror.

exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: I got all the reps. The last rep on set three was tough. I probably would not have been able to do one more.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Got all the reps here. Left shoulder is tired but less tired than it's typically been on that exercise in the past.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly (cable or DB)
exercises.note: Did 11 lbs cause that was the lowest on the cable machine that had 2 cables so I can do both arms at the same time. Last rep pretty tough. I liked the burn on this one.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + Incline DB Curl
exercises.planned: Rope pushdown 80 lb × 12 + Incline DB curl 20 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: The tricep pushdown was tough but I got all of the reps. I think it was tough because of the skull crushers that I did earlier in the week, which was the first time I did that and they gave me a little bit extra DOMS. I got all of the curls. I did 12 reps on the last set of the curls.

exercises.name: Core Circuit B
exercises.planned: Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side + Ab Wheel × 8-10 + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: I got 10 per side on both sets of the bird dogs. Also 10 on the ab wheel. On the bird dogs I did a crunch so I did one side at a time and crunched in elbow to knee.
